title: Glastels
body:
See the world through pastels...

This resource pack changes the colors of all stained glass blocks and panes to be pastel in color!

Perfect for that soft cozy feel :)
<hr>

This pack is also compatible with the [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) mod to have connected glass textures! To make this compatible, you will need the Fusion mod as well as the [Fusion Connected Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fusion-connected-glass) resource pack, and place Glastels above Fusion Connected Glass in the resource pack list
<center>
<hr>

[![PlanetMinecraft Profile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d38d79c42fb138d5622436912f9e74b0813bb7c.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/hippopotamoss/)    [![Email me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e7ab324e2bd68876f66e2d453151d343750c54a.png)](mailto:hippocoveredinmoss@gmail.com)    [![Donate on Paypal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f2d7f7ff0399f638be6c17b90dca235428eb498.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/hippopotamoss)
</center>
